articles.description: Hansi Flick has guided a new style of Barcelona to back-to-back La Liga titles - this is how the German coach did it.
articles.title: Barcelona win La Liga: How Hansi Flick's side dominated Real

articles.description: The most consequential decision in the history of VAR in the Premier League is played out over four minutes 11 seconds of drama at London Stadium.
articles.title: Biggest VAR call ever? Four chaotic minutes that defined the season

articles.description: Former England and Manchester United striker Wayne Rooney believes the video assistant referee "did a really good job" in disallowing West Ham's late equaliser against Arsenal.
articles.title: Wayne Rooney says VAR did 'a really good job' in making a crucial call in Arsenal's win at West Ham

articles.description: Have your say on Arsenal's dramatic win at West Ham United on Sunday which put them five points clear of Manchester City.
articles.title: Premier League reaction: Was that Arsenal's title-winning moment?

articles.description: England’s 2006 World Cup squad was a ‘golden generation’ – David Beckham, Wayne Rooney, Rio Ferdinand, Steven Gerrard, Frank Lampard. Why did it go wrong in Baden-Baden and why did some people blame the WAGs
articles.title: Golden Generation

articles.description: When the dust settles on the West Ham goal that was ruled out against Arsenal, the cold reality is they are now probably facing relegation.
articles.title: West Ham move closer to relegation as survival chances cut to 12%

articles.description: Victor Wembanyama is ejected for the first time in his NBA career as the San Antonio Spurs are beaten by the Minnesota Timberwolves.
articles.title: Victor Wembanyama ejected for flagrant foul as San Antonio Spurs beaten by Minnesota Timberwolves

articles.description: Match of the Day pundit Danny Murphy explains why Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta deserves credit after his side beat West Ham to take a huge step towards the Premier League title.
articles.title: Danny Murphy column: 'Only his last changes worked' - how Arteta's gambles finally paid off

articles.description: Manager Danny Rohl has to learn some lessons, and quickly, after falling away to a third-place finish in the Scottish Premiership, writes Kheredine Idessane.
articles.title: Rangers: How big is Danny Rohl’s rebuild this summer?

articles.description: Khadija Shaw needed just 12 minutes to prove why Manchester City must not let her leave in the summer.
articles.title: Why Manchester City would be foolish to let Khadija Shaw leave
